get.summary: VERSIONS :: Gets IMS services supported versions
get.description: This method returns the list of supported versions of the IMS.

get.summary: PING :: Ping Service interface, checks whether the server is available or not.
get.description: This method returns the server availability status.

post.summary: MULTIPARTMESSAGE_V3 :: Publish message to ION via IMS
post.description: This method will be validating message request as per API specification and publish the message and returns whether the message is successfully published or not.

parameters.name: logicalId
parameters.description: The From LogicalId as query parameter to specify from which application multipart message is being published

parameters.name: documentName
parameters.description: The document name as query parameter of multipart message that is being published

parameters.name: ParameterRequest
parameters.description:
Parameter Request File. The content type must be set to application/json. When selecting a file in this swagger, make sure that file has a '.json' extension
 Example: 
{
  "documentName" : "Sync.SalesOrder",
  "messageId" : "message1",
  "fromLogicalId" : "lid://infor.ims.imsap",
  "toLogicalId" : "lid://default",
  "encoding" : "NONE",
  "characterSet" : "UTF-8",
  "accountingEntity" : "ae1",
  "location" : "loc123",
  "documentId" : "sdafas",
  "variationId" : 1,
  "revisionId" : "123",
  "batchId" : "infor.SSJE:1",
  "batchSequence" : 2,
  "batchSize" : 1,
  "batchRevision" : 1,
  "batchAbortIndicator" : true,
  "instances" : "1",
  "source" : "DB Connector",
  "custom_property1" : "value1",
  "custom_property2" : "value2"
}

parameters.name: MessagePayload
parameters.description: Message Payload File. The content type must be set to application/octet-stream. When selecting a file in this swagger, make sure that file has no extension, a '.bin' extension or any other extension which resolves to this content type.
